prestazioni: Lamborghini L539 6.5L V12 naturally aspirated engine: Novitec Torado V12 supercharger kit with twin Rotrex C38-92 centrifugal superchargers (1.4 bar boost), custom Novitec-forged internals (pistons, connecting rods, crankshaft), and Novitec CNC-ported cylinder heads with oversized titanium valves and upgraded valve springs for 1,000+ HP on 100-octane fuel

Lamborghini ISR (Iniezione Strategica Ridotta) direct injection system upgrade: Injector Dynamics ID2000x injectors paired with a Motec M150 ECU for precise fuel mapping, alongside a custom Novitec high-flow fuel system with dual Walbro 450 LPH pumps and a Radium Engineering fuel pressure regulator

Ohlins TTX46 MkII coilovers with 3-way adjustable damping (compression, rebound, and ride height), custom Lamborghini-specific spring rates (12 kg/mm front, 16 kg/mm rear), and integrated electronic ride height adjustment via Ohlins Unic suspension controller for track-day optimization
estetica: Novitec Torado widebody conversion kit with carbon fiber fender flares (30mm wider front, 50mm wider rear), custom 3D-scanned to fit the Aventador Roadster’s removable roof structure, paired with Novitec carbon fiber side skirts and front splitter with integrated canards

Rocket Bunny V3 aero kit for Aventador Roadster, featuring a carbon fiber GT-style rear wing with adjustable angle (0-15 degrees) and a custom ducktail spoiler extension for improved high-speed stability, along with a full carbon fiber underbody diffuser with integrated titanium exhaust outlets

Novitec carbon fiber engine cover with heat-extracting vents and a custom titanium bolt-on intake manifold cover, paired with a full titanium exhaust system by Capristo (4.5-inch diameter, quad outlets) with electronically controlled bypass valves and a custom Novitec heat-wrapped downpipe for aggressive sound tuning
